name: User Preferences
copyPolicy: Use English labels as working copy/placeholders unless Arabic copy is provided. Preserve space for Arabic translation.
productPurpose: Personal settings modal for user-level display, appearance, profile, and experience choices that affect S-System across apps.

entryPoint.availability: Any app that uses the standard SUI application shell.

placementRule: Use User Preferences for personal display, appearance, profile, and experience choices. Do not place app-specific filters or task/document actions here.

dialogComposition.rule: Use SUI Backdrop and Dialog around User Profile Settings dialog content.

tabs.appearancePurpose: Home for display-related preferences such as icon appearance.

appearanceIconMode.previewRule: Show icon rendering preview that changes between Colorful and Monochrome.
appearanceIconMode.flowOwnership: The type icon appearance flow belongs to User Preferences. Task Management is only the downstream result example.

uxStates.rule: Current app remains visible behind the profile menu.
Current app remains visible under the backdrop.
Appearance tab is active and shows display-related settings.
Show the changed control state clearly; use dialog actions when explicit confirmation is part of the interaction.
Show how the selected preference affects UI elements when a setting changes visual appearance.

drawingRules: Open User Preferences from the sidebar avatar menu in any app.
Use SUI Backdrop and Dialog components for the modal state.
Use Appearance as the active tab for icon appearance settings.
Use published SUI components by componentKey.
Keep RTL alignment and preserve Arabic expansion space.
Treat the Teletronics SUI design system file as read-only.
